title: Create production-grade solution structure for Azure Functions pipeline
acceptance_criteria: solution and project structure exist for Functions, EventPublisher, tests, docs, infra, and sample-data
project names are clean and consistent with the regulatory intake domain
no feature implementation beyond foundational structure
notes: Keep the repo local-first and Azure-oriented.
prompt_hint: Read README.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/adr-local-infra.md, docs/coding-standards.md, docs/sequence-diagram.md, docs/tradeoffs.md, docs/demo-script.md, and docs/TASKS.md first. Then create the initial production-grade solution structure only for this Azure Functions/Azurite regulatory intake pipeline.

title: Add Docker Compose for Azurite with Blob, Queue, and Table services
acceptance_criteria: infra/docker-compose.yml exists
Azurite exposes blob, queue, and table ports
configuration is suitable for local development

title: Add local settings and configuration scaffolding for storage-backed local execution
acceptance_criteria: local.settings.json.example exists
all required storage/container/table/queue settings are represented
configuration names are consistent across code and docs

title: Implement Blob, Queue, and Table storage service abstractions
acceptance_criteria: storage service classes exist and compile
services are registered through dependency injection
abstractions are minimal and production-minded
notes: Write the code as if it were real Azure-oriented code.

title: Implement Event Grid-style event models and intake domain models
acceptance_criteria: Event Grid envelope model exists
blob-created event data model exists
intake and queue message models exist and are strongly typed
notes: Prefer explicit models over loose dictionaries.

title: Implement metadata validation and checksum services
acceptance_criteria: metadata validator exists and validates required fields
checksum service computes file hashes
services are testable and have no trigger-specific logic
notes: Keep logic in services, not in Functions.

title: Implement HTTP-triggered Function to receive Event Grid-style blob-created events
acceptance_criteria: HTTP-triggered function endpoint exists
function parses Event Grid-style payloads
invalid payloads are handled cleanly
function remains thin and delegates to orchestration service
notes: This is the local Event Grid simulation entrypoint.

title: Implement intake orchestration service for validation, persistence, routing, and queue publishing
acceptance_criteria: orchestrator handles valid and invalid document flows
intake records are written to table storage
valid documents are routed for downstream processing
invalid documents are routed to quarantine
notes: Keep orchestration logic centralized and testable.

title: Implement queue-triggered document processing Function
acceptance_criteria: queue-triggered function exists
processing result is written to table storage
logging is clear and aligned with the intake flow
notes: Keep this intentionally lightweight for MVP.

title: Implement validated and quarantine blob routing behavior
acceptance_criteria: invalid documents are routed to quarantine-documents
valid documents are routed to validated-documents
routing logic is clear and auditable

title: Create local console publisher to upload a sample document and post Event Grid-style payload
acceptance_criteria: console publisher uploads a sample file to raw-documents
publisher posts valid Event Grid-style payload to the local Function endpoint
publisher configuration is easy to adjust locally
notes: This should enable a complete local demo flow.

title: Add sample documents and local demo support files
acceptance_criteria: sample files exist under sample-data/
files are suitable for demonstrating ingestion flow
naming aligns with regulatory domain (e.g., sanctions.json, trades.csv)

title: Add unit tests for metadata validation and checksum services
acceptance_criteria: unit tests exist for metadata validation
unit tests exist for checksum generation
tests are deterministic and isolated

title: Add integration test coverage for the local intake pipeline against Azurite-compatible flow
acceptance_criteria: integration test project exists or is extended
core ingestion flow is covered end-to-end
environment/setup instructions are documented if needed

title: Complete README with architecture summary, local run instructions, and production migration path
acceptance_criteria: README explains the project clearly
README documents Azurite-based local setup
README explains how to migrate to real Azure
notes: This is a portfolio asset, not just an internal README.

title: Finalize documentation under docs folder and align it with the implemented solution
acceptance_criteria: docs are consistent with the codebase
architecture and ADR docs reflect actual implementation
demo instructions are usable
